test_proxy_mode.binding_note: Every Director-level approval, rejection, or doctrine change in this test instance is signed by michael.lamb. A Flight Recorder event of type 'director_proxy_acting' is written alongside every such signature capturing the role being proxied. Production cutover MUST re-seat distinct natural persons for each director and flip test_proxy_mode.enabled to false.

ceo.title: CEO
ceo.domain: Overall enterprise intent; final arbiter of irreconcilable doctrine conflicts; sole authority for mission/vision changes.
ceo.authority: Final arbiter for conflicts between directors. Sole authority to approve doctrine mutations of the doctrine-root vertex. CEO can grant or revoke any delegation in seconds.

cfo.title: CFO
cfo.domain: Financial doctrine, spending thresholds, capital allocation, autonomy budget caps.
cfo.authority: Owns Financial Governor Agent. Can throttle financial autonomy to zero. Approves non-routine spend above governor threshold.

legal_director.title: Legal Director
legal_director.domain: Regulatory compliance doctrine, jurisdictional rules, legal personality boundary enforcement.
legal_director.authority: Owns Legal & Compliance Governor Agent. Any novel regulatory interpretation MUST route through Legal Director approval; agents may not self-resolve.

market_director.title: Market Director
market_director.domain: External posture, brand doctrine, competitive strategy constraints.
market_director.authority: Owns Market & Ecosystem Governor Agent. Approves marketing campaigns above campaign auto-approve threshold (test scale). Owns crisis communications doctrine.

ciso.title: CISO
ciso.domain: Security doctrine, trust boundaries, resilience posture, incident response thresholds.
ciso.authority: Owns Security & Trust Governor Agent. Can invoke safe-mode / kill-switch on any agent. All OHSHAT tier incidents route here first.

cpo.title: CPO
cpo.activation_reason: 4 declared product lines: Streaming, Gaming, Advertising, Live
cpo.authority: Owns product roadmap doctrine, innovation pipeline governance, product-level autonomy budget allocation.

cto.title: CTO
cto.reason_not_active: Test instance consolidates technical stewardship under CEO; CISO owns security-technical concerns.
